name: codex-music
description: AI-native music editing studio for the web.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix apps/web run dev" "uv run --directory apps/api uvicorn codex_music_api.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
scripts.lint:api: uv run --directory apps/api ruff check src
scripts.format:api: uv run --directory apps/api ruff format src
